name: Skillet Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Can whole kernel corn with sweet peppers, (12 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the corn and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a skillet.
3. Spoon 2 tablespoons of butter into the melted milk, using a fork to combine.
4. Stir in the remaining corn with its liquid.
5. Mix together the cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
6. Add milk to the corn meal mixture just until moistened.
7. Pour the corn meal mixture into the skillet.
8. Sprinkle the corn on top.
9. Cover and cook for 25 to 30 minutes.
